name: GoldON Resources Ltd.
summary: GoldON Resources Ltd., an exploration stage company, engages in the exploration of mineral properties in Canada. It primarily explores for gold and silver deposits. The company owns the Slate Falls project that covers an area of approximately 5,687 hectares consisting of 82 cell mineral claims located near Slate Falls in northwestern Ontario. It also has options to purchase the West Madsen Gold project, Pipestone Bay property, McDonough property, and Bruce Lake property located in Ontario. The company was formerly known as Newcastle Minerals Ltd. and changed its name to GoldON Resources Ltd. in March 2013. GoldON Resources Ltd. was incorporated in 1977 and is based in Victoria, Canada.
